name: horizon-new-tab
description: A beautiful, productivity-focused new tab Chrome extension

scripts.build: VITE_FIREBASE_ENV=production vite build && cp public/manifest.json dist/ && cp -r public/icons dist/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:dev: VITE_FIREBASE_ENV=development vite build && cp public/manifest.json dist/ && cp -r public/icons dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && sed -i '' 's/1021420058440-rkut76at70achk9qbqvle2g2sdh5rsr7/425487238446-irlqkrs5r7ktbil85ofrrgs7h6q6kv84/g' dist/manifest.json
